world.name: The Erimentha Reach
lore_facts: The Ashfield has been a hunting ground for generations, its slime population cycling with the seasons.
The Monster Hunters Guild maintains order across settlements by issuing bounties and tracking field reports.
Something unusual has been stirring in the eastern reach for the past season -- no confirmed sightings yet.
Thornwall grew up around the guild outpost as hunters needed a place to rest between field runs.
The inn has operated under the same family for three generations.
The south road slime problem is a recurring seasonal issue the guild has never fully solved.
Ashenvale sits on the eastern edge of the reach, closer to whatever is stirring in the deep field.
Its residents are more wary of outsiders than Thornwall -- the eastern reach has a harder reputation.
